nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet2

parameters.content:
## 📧 OUTREACH GMAIL FOLLOW-UPS AUTOMATION

**PURPOSE:** Automatically sends follow-up emails to prospects via Gmail based on Google Sheets tracking data

**HOW IT WORKS:**
1. Two trigger modes: Schedule (periodic check) OR Real-time (sheet updates)
2. Reads prospect data from Google Sheets
3. Filters for Gmail-eligible contacts
4. Sends appropriate follow-up messages (F1 or F2)
5. Updates tracking timestamps in sheet

**PREREQUISITES:**
✓ Google Sheets OAuth credentials (salmanadnan0206)
✓ Gmail OAuth credentials (salmanadnan0206)
✓ Spreadsheet: "Digitalise Prospecting- Skool / 2025"
✓ Sheet tab: "December"

**TO EXECUTE:**
- Auto-runs on schedule (default: hourly)
- Auto-triggers on sheet row updates
- Or click "Execute Workflow" for manual run

**EXPECTED OUTPUTS:**
- Follow-up emails sent via Gmail
- Sheet updated with "Sequence Last Date" timestamp
- F1/F2 Outreach columns marked "Done"

## 🔄 TRIGGER METHODS

**Two ways to start workflow:**

1️⃣ **Schedule Trigger** (Top path)
   - Runs on regular schedule
   - Default: Every hour
   - Processes all eligible rows

2️⃣ **Google Sheets Trigger** (Bottom path)
   - Real-time response to sheet updates
   - Activates when row data changes
   - Immediate processing

## 📊 DATA INPUT STAGE

**Schedule Path:**
- Gets ALL rows from December sheet
- Passes to filter logic

**Trigger Path:**
- Receives SINGLE updated row
- Immediately processes change

## 🎯 FILTERING LOGIC

**Schedule Path (If):**
Checks if prospect was outreached via:
- Contains "Gmail" OR
- Equals "gmail" OR  
- Equals "Salman"

**Trigger Path (If1 → If2):**
- If1: Same Gmail checks
- If2: Ensures "Sequence Last Date" is EMPTY
  (prevents duplicate follow-ups)

## ✅ INITIAL TIMESTAMP

**Trigger Path Only:**

When a new Gmail prospect is added:
- Sets "Sequence Last Date" to NOW
- Establishes baseline for follow-ups
- Prevents immediate F1/F2 sends

**Why?** Creates tracking foundation
for time-based follow-up sequences

## 🔀 FOLLOW-UP ROUTING

**If3 Decision:**
Determines which follow-up to send

✅ **TRUE Path** → Send F1 Gmail
- First follow-up message
- Retrieved from sheet column "F1 Gmail"

❌ **FALSE Path** → Route to If4
- Checks conditions for F2

## 📧 F1 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE

**Get many messages:**
- Searches Gmail for original thread
- Finds conversation with prospect

**Reply to a message:**
- Sends F1 follow-up content
- Replies to existing thread
- Message text from sheet: "F1 Gmail" column

**Append or update row in sheet1:**
- Updates "Sequence Last Date" with timestamp
- Marks "F1 - Outreach" as "Done"
- Prevents duplicate F1 sends

## 📧 F2 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE

**If4 Decision:**
Checks if F2 should be sent
(Conditions determine eligibility)

**Get many messages1:**
- Retrieves original Gmail thread

**Reply to a message1:**
- Sends F2 follow-up content  
- Message from "F2 Gmail" column

**Append or update row in sheet2:**
- Updates "Sequence Last Date"
- Marks "F2 - Outreach" as "Done"
- Completes tracking

## ⚙️ CONFIGURATION NOTES

**Customize These Settings:**

1. **Schedule Frequency:**
   Adjust "Schedule Trigger" interval

2. **Follow-up Messages:**
   Edit sheet columns "F1 Gmail" & "F2 Gmail"

3. **Filtering Criteria:**
   Modify If/If1 conditions for prospect selection

4. **If3/If4 Logic:**
   Define when F1 vs F2 should send
   (Currently needs completion)

5. **Google Sheets:**
   Update document/sheet if using different source

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTES

**Before Running:**
- Ensure OAuth credentials are connected
- Verify sheet structure matches expected columns
- Test with single prospect first
- Review F1/F2 message templates

**Data Flow:**
Google Sheets → Filter → Send Email → Update Sheet

**Key Columns Used:**
- Name - Outreached - I
- F1 Gmail / F2 Gmail (message content)
- Sequence Last Date (tracking)
- F1/F2 - Outreach (completion flags)
